Joshua24:1 Dane Yosua tumuli maumang suku-suku Israele makasami ring Sikem. Irika parapanglingsir
Joshua24:2 Dane Yosua tumuli ngandika ring wong Israele makasami
Joshua24:3 Sasubane keto
Joshua24:4 tur Ulun maicayang Yakub muah Esau teken Ishak. Ulun maicayang tanah pagunungan Edome teken Esau makadadi tanah gelahnyane
Joshua24:5 Sasubane keto Ulun lantas ngutus Musa muah Harun
Joshua24:6 Ulun ngajak leluur kitane magedi uli di Mesir
Joshua24:7 ia pada masesambatan nunas ica teken Ulun. Ditu Ulun laut ngadakang peteng dedet buat melatin ia klawan wong Mesire. Buina gaenang Ulun apanga ombak pasihe pada magulungan tur nganyudang wong Mesire. Kita suba nawang unduke ane suba laksanayang Ulun marep teken gumi Mesire. Sasubane keto kita laut nongos di tegal melakange makelo pesan.
Joshua24:8 Suud keto Ulun lantas ngajak kita ka gumin wong Amorine ane nongos dangin Tukad Yordane. Wong Amorine pada nyiatin kita
Joshua24:9 Sasubane keto
Joshua24:10 Nanging Ulun tusing ngisinin pinunas Bileame ento. Ento awanane ia lantas ngamertanin kita. Malantaran ento Ulun ngluputang kita uli Balak.
Joshua24:11 Sasubane keto kita lantas ngliwatin Tukad Yordane
Joshua24:12 Dikalane kita ngarepang mapag imusuh
Joshua24:13 Ulun maicayang pategalan ane tusing taen pamulain kita
Joshua24:14 Dane Yosua malih nglanturang pangandika sapuniki: “Duaning punika
Joshua24:15 Yening semeton nenten kayun astiti bakti ring Ida
Joshua24:16 Wong Israele tumuli masaur manuk sapuniki: “Tiang sareng sami nenten jaga nilar Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa tur nenten jaga nyungsung dewa-dewa sane lianan.
Joshua24:17 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Joshua24:18 Rikala iraga ngaug jagate puniki
Joshua24:19 Dane Yosua malih ngandika ring anake akeh punika
Joshua24:20 Duaning punika yening semeton nilar Ida tur nyungsung dewa-dewa sane lian
Joshua24:21 Rakyate sami pada masaur manuk sapuniki: “Nenten pisan kadi asapunika. Tiang jaga tansah astiti bakti ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa.”
Joshua24:22 Dane Yosua malih ngandika: “Semeton ngraga sampun dados saksi mungguing semeton sareng sami sampun pada ingkup jaga astiti bakti wantah ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa kewanten.” Pasaur pasamuane: “Inggih titiang makasami dados saksi.”
Joshua24:23 Dane Yosua malih ngluedang sapuniki: “Yening kadi asapunika
Joshua24:24 Rakyate raris sumaur
Joshua24:25 Duaning punika
Joshua24:26 Dane Yosua nyuratang pidabdab miwah uger-ugere punika ring cakepan Pidabdab Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa. Sasampune punika dane raris ngambil batu sane ageng tumuli kajujukang ring wit tarune sane ageng
Joshua24:27 Dane raris ngandika ring bangsane punika sami
Joshua24:28 Sawusan punika Dane Yosua raris ngandikayang rakyate makaon saking irika
Joshua24:29 Sasampune punika Dane Yosua okan Dane Nun parekan Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa raris seda rikala dane mayusa satus dasa warsa.
Joshua24:30 Layon danene raris kaperemang ring tanah duman danene ring Timnat-Serah
Joshua24:31 Sapanyeneng Dane Yosua
Joshua24:32 Layon Dane Yusup
Joshua24:33 Dane Eleasar
Judges1:1 Sasampune Dane Yosua seda
Judges1:2 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa tumuli masabda sapuniki: “Suku Yehuda ane patut majalan paling maluna. Ulun lakar nyerahang tanahe ento teken ia.”
Judges1:3 Suku Yehuda raris mabaos ring suku Simeone
Judges1:4 miwah suku Yehuda sinarengan lunga ka payudan. Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa mapaica kamenangan ring suku Yehuda miwah Simeon
Judges1:5 Ring Besek suku Yehuda miwah Simeon kapanggih ring Ida Sang Prabu Adoni-Besek
Judges1:6 Ida jerih kapilayu
Judges1:7 Irika Sang Prabu Adoni-Besek raris mabaos sapuniki: “Wenten pararatu pitung dasa diri akehnya
Judges1:8 Suku Yehuda raris ngebug kota Yerusaleme
Judges1:9 Sasampune punika suku Yehuda raris mamargi ngebug wong Kanaan sane magenah ring pagunungan miwah sane ring bongkol gununge
Judges1:10 Suku Yehuda taler mamargi ngebug wong Kanaane sane wenten ring kota Hebron
Judges1:11 Saking irika suku Yehudane mamargi ngebug kota Debire. Duk punika kotane punika mawasta Kiryat-Seper.
Judges1:12 Saking pantaran suku Yehudane punika
Judges1:13 Dane Otniel kaponakan Dane Kaleb okan arin danene sane mapesengan Kenas
Judges1:14 Ring rahina pabuncingannyane
Judges1:15 Dane Aksa tumuli matur sapuniki: “Tiang mamanah nunas makudang-kudang toya klebutan
Judges1:16 Parakaturunan matuan Dane Musa
Judges1:17 Suku Yehudane kasarengin antuk suku Simeon raris mamargi ngaonang wong Kanaan sane magenah ring kota Sepat. Kotane punika raris katemah tur kasirnayang tumuli kawastanin Horma.
Judges1:18 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa mapaica pitulungan ring suku Yehudane
Judges1:19 
Judges1:20 Sakadi sane sampun kapangandikayang antuk Dane Musa
Judges1:21 Nanging suku Benyamin nenten mrasidayang ngaonang wong Yebuse sane magenah ring Yerusalem. Punika awinanipun wong Yebuse punika kantun magenah irika sareng-sareng ring suku Benyamine.
Judges1:22 Suku-suku Epraim miwah Manasene raris mamargi ngebug kota Betel. Daweg punika kotane punika mawasta Lus. Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa mapaica pitulungan ring suku Epraim miwah Manase punika. Suku Epraim miwah Manase punika raris ngutus mata-mata ka kotane punika.
Judges1:23 
Judges1:24 Mata-matane punika kacunduk ring anak sane sedekan medal saking kota. Irika mata-matane punika raris mabaos ring anake punika
Judges1:25 Irika anake punika raris matujuhin mata-matane punika margi. Suku Epraim miwah Manasene raris ngamademang sakancan jadmane sane ring kotane punika
Judges1:26 Sasampune punika anake punika raris makaon ngungsi tanah wong Hete
Judges1:27 Suku Manase nenten ngaonang jadmane sane magenah ring kota-kota: Bet-Sean
Judges1:28 Rikala bangsa Israele sampun sayan kuat
Judges1:29 Suku Epraim nenten mrasidayang ngaonang wong Kanaane sane magenah ring kota Geser
Judges1:30 Suku Sebulon nenten ngaonang jadmane sane magenah ring kota-kota Kitron miwah Nahalol. Punika awinanipun wong Kanaane tetep magenah irika sareng-sareng ring suku Sebulone
Judges1:31 Suku Aser nenten ngaonang jadmane sane magenah ring kota-kota Ako
Judges1:32 Suku Aser magenah irika sinarengan ring wong Kanaan sane wenten irika
Judges1:33 Suku Naptaline nenten ngaonang jadmane sane magenah ring kota-kota Bet-Semes miwah Bet-Anat. Suku Naptaline magenah irika sareng-sareng ring wong Kanaane sane wenten irika
Judges1:34 Wong Amorine nangsek suku Dane ka kota-kota ring pagunungan
Judges1:35 Wong Amorine kantun tetep magenah ring Ayalon
Judges1:36 Baler kota Selane
Judges2:1 Malaekat Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa raris lunga saking Gilgal
Judges2:2 Kita tusing dadi ngae prajanjian ngajak bangsa-bangsa ane nongos di gumine ene. Kita patut nguugang pamorboran-pamorboran aturannyane. Nanging kita tusing nglaksanayang unduk ane sabdayang Ulun ento. Kita suba nyalanang paundukan ane matungkalikan teken ento.
Judges2:3 Sawireh keto
Judges2:4 Sasampun sang malaekat ngandika kadi asapunika
Judges2:5 Punika awinanipun genahe punika kawastanin Bokim. Irika ipun sareng sami ngaturang aturan ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa.
Judges2:6 Dane Yosua ngandikayang bangsa Israele mangda pada mamargi ngungsi tanah sane dados dumannyane suang-suang.
Judges2:7 Sapanyeneng Dane Yosua
Judges2:8 Dane Yosua okan Dane Nun
Judges2:9 Dane kapendem ring tanah danene ring Timnat-Heres ring Pagunungan Epraim
Judges2:10 Sawatek anak sane maiaban ring dane sami sampun seda
Judges2:11 Sasampune punika bangsa Israele tumuli ngardi dosa ring ayun Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges2:12 Ipun wusan nyungsung Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges2:13 Ipun wusan nyungsung Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges2:14 Punika awinan Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa duka ring bangsa Israele
Judges2:15 Sabilang ipun medal ka payudan
Judges2:16 Sasampune punika Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa raris mapaica pamimpin-pamimpin ring bangsa Israele
Judges2:17 Nanging bangsa Israele nenten nglinguang pamimpin-pamimpin ipune punika. Bangsa Israele sampun nenten satia ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa tur ipun nyungsung widi sane lianan. Leluuripune sampun satinut ring sapatitah Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges2:18 Nyabran Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa mapaica pamimpin ring bangsa Israele
Judges2:19 Nanging yening pamimpin punika padem
Judges2:20 Duaning punika Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa duka ring bangsa Israele
Judges2:21 Ulun tusing buin ngediang bangsa-bangsane ane enu di gumine ene dugase Yosua mati.
Judges2:22 Ulun lakar nganggon bangsa-bangsane ento buat mintonin bangsa Israele
Judges2:23 Punika awinanipun Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa nglugrain bangsa-bangsane punika kantun ring jagate punika. Ida nenten nglugrain Dane Yosua ngaonang ipun
Judges3:1 Dadosipun
Judges3:2 Ida ngamargiang paindikane puniki
Judges3:3 Bangsa-bangsa sane kantun ring jagate punika inggih punika
Judges3:4 Ipun sareng sami punika kanggen mintonin wong Israele
Judges3:5 Punika awinanipun bangsa Israele magenah tur magumana ring pantaran wong Kanaan
Judges3:6 Ipun pada saling juang ngajak bangsa-bangsane punika
Judges3:7 Bangsa Israele lali malih ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges3:8 Duaning punika Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa duka ring ipun
Judges3:9 Sasampune punika bangsa Israele raris masesambatan nunas ica ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa tur Ida raris ngutus anak adiri buat mebasang ipun. Anake punika mapesengan Otniel. Dane Otniel punika okan Dane Kenas arin Dane Kaleb.
Judges3:10 Roh Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa ngencegin Dane Otniel tur dane dados pamimpin bangsa Israele. Dane raris medal ka payudan
Judges3:11 Irika raris wenten sutrepti ring jagate punika ngantos petang dasa warsa suenipun
Judges3:12 Bangsa Israele malih ngardi dosa ring ayun Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa. Duaning punika Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges3:13 Sang Prabu Eglon makanti sraya sareng wong Amon miwah wong Amaleke. Ida raris ngaonang wong Israele tur ngrampas kota Yeriko
Judges3:14 Bangsa Israel kereh antuk Sang Prabu Eglon kantos plekutus warsa suenipun.
Judges3:15 Sasampune punika bangsa Israele raris masesambatan nunas ica ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa tur Ida raris ngutus Dane Ehud buat mebasang ipun. Dane Ehud punika anak sane ngebotin. Dane punika okan Dane Gera saking suku Benyamin. Bangsa Israele raris ngutus Dane Ehud tangkil ring Ida Sang Prabu Eglon ring Moab
Judges3:16 Dane Ehud sampun makarya pedang sane marai kekalih
Judges3:17 Sasampune punika
Judges3:18 Sasampune Dane Ehud ngaturang upetine punika ring ida
Judges3:19 Nanging rikala rauh ring batu-batune sane mukir sane nampek ring Gilgal
Judges3:20 Daweg punika ida sang prabu malinggih ring kamar idane sane dayuh ring loteng purine. Dane Ehud raris tangkil ring ida sarwi matur sapuniki: “Wenten sabdan Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa sane patut aturang titiang ring palungguh iratu.” Ida sang prabu raris ngadeg.
Judges3:21 Dane Ehud raris ngaud pedang sane ring tengen danene punika
Judges3:22 Pedange punika leb makasami
Judges3:23 Sasampune punika Dane Ehud raris medal. Jelanane raris kubetang tur kakancing
Judges3:24 tur dane raris makaon. Rikala parekane pada rauh
Judges3:25 Sasampun sue nyantosang
Judges3:26 Rikala parekane punika pada nyantosang
Judges3:27 Rikala dane rauh ring Pagunungan Epraim
Judges3:28 Dane raris ngandika sapuniki: “Tututinja tiang! Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa sampun mapaica kamenangan ring semeton
Judges3:29 Ring rahinane punika
Judges3:30 Ring rahinane punika bangsa Israele ngaonang wong Moabe
Judges3:31 Pamimpin sane lianan
Judges4:1 Sasampun Dane Ehud seda
Judges4:2 Duaning punika Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa manggayang ipun kakaonang antuk Sang Prabu Yabin ratun wong Kanaan sane mrentah ring kota Hasor. Senapatin wadua balan idane mapesengan Sisera
Judges4:3 Sang Prabu Yabin madue kreta perang besi sangang atus akehipun
Judges4:4 Duk punika sane dados pamimpin bangsa Israele
Judges4:5 Dane Debora biasanipun malinggih ring sor satunggaling wit korma sane wenten ring pantaran Rama klawan Betel ring Pagunungan Epraim
Judges4:6 Sedek rahina anu
Judges4:7 Ulun lakar nunden Sisera
Judges4:8 Dane Barak tumuli nyaurin Dane Debora sapuniki: “Tiang jaga mamargi yening semeton kayun nyarengin tiang
Judges4:9 Pasaur Dane Debora
Judges4:10 Tur Dane Barak mimpin suku Sebulon miwah Naptali mamargi ka Kedes. Sane ngiring Dane Barak miwah Dane Debora wenten dasa tali diri.
Judges4:11 Daweg punika
Judges4:12 Rikala Dane Sisera mireng mungguing Dane Barak sampun munggah ka Gunung Tabor
Judges4:13 dane raris munduhang kreta perang danene sane sangang atus punika makamiwah wadua balan danene sami
Judges4:14 Irika Dane Debora mabaos ring Dane Barak
Judges4:15 Rikala Dane Barak miwah wadua balan danene matempuh yuda
Judges4:16 Dane Barak nguber kreta-kreta miwah wadua balane punika ngantos rauh ka Haroset-Hagoyim
Judges4:17 Dane Sisera malaib ka kemah Yaele
Judges4:18 Yael raris medal mendakin Dane Sisera
Judges4:19 Dane Sisera raris mabaos ring Yael sapuniki: “Baangja icang ngidih yeh inem
Judges4:20 Sasampune punika Dane Sisera raris mabaos ring Yael sapuniki: “Majujukja di obag-obagan jelanan kemahe. Yen ada anak teka matakon
Judges4:21 Dane Sisera kalintang lesu
Judges4:22 Rikala Dane Barak rauh ngrereh Dane Sisera
Judges4:23 Ring rahinane punika Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa mapaica kamenangan ring bangsa Israele nglawan Sang Prabu Yabin
Judges4:24 Bangsa Israele sayan mangetang nangsek Ida Sang Prabu Yabin. Pamuputipun bangsa Israele nyirnayang ida.
Judges5:1 Ring rahinane punika Dane Debora miwah Dane Barak okan Dane Abinoam makidung kadi asapuniki:
Judges5:2 Pujija Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa. Bangsa Israele sampun nyadia jaga mayuda
Judges5:3 Inggih pararatu sami
Judges5:4 Duh Ratu Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges5:5 Gunung-gununge pada magejeran ring ayun Widin Sinaine
Judges5:6 Ring masan Dane Samgar okan Dane Anat
Judges5:7 Duh Debora
Judges5:8 Irika raris wenten yuda ring jagate punika
Judges5:9 Manah tiange leket ring parasenapatin bangsa Israele
Judges5:10 Tuturangja indike punika
Judges5:11 Pirengangja suaran anake akeh mabiayuhan ring sisin semere
Judges5:12 Duh Debora
Judges5:13 Sasampune punika paraanake sane satia tuu pada ngrauhin pamimpinnyane
Judges5:14 Ipun pada mamargi saking Epraim ka lebake nututin suku Benyamin miwah rakyatnyane. Parasenapatine pada rauh saking Makir
Judges5:15 Parapamimpin suku Isakare rauh sareng-sareng ring Dane Debora
Judges5:16 Napi awinannya ipun kantun ring ungkur
Judges5:17 Suku Gad magenah ring dangin Tukad Yordane miwah suku Dan kantun ring kapal-kapalnyane. Suku Aser sane magenah nampek ka pasisi
Judges5:18 Nanging suku Sebulon miwah Naptali ngetohang jiwannyane ring ranang gana.
Judges5:19 Ring Taanak nampek ring Tukad Megidone
Judges5:20 Bintang-bintange mayuda saking akasane. Rikala ipun pada nglintang ring akasane
Judges5:21 Blabare ring Tukad Kisone pada nganyudang ipun
Judges5:22 Irika raris wenten kuda ngredeg
Judges5:23 Malaekat Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa masabda sapuniki: “Temahja kota Merose. Temah
Judges5:24 Ni Yael kurenan Hebere
Judges5:25 Sisera nagih toya
Judges5:26 Limanipune sane aneh makta patok kemah
Judges5:27 Sisera bah maglebug. Ipun bah nylempang ring buntut Yaele. Ipun bah ka tanahe raris padem.
Judges5:28 Memen Siserane nengok saking jendelane. Ipun malengok saking ungkur trali sarwi mataken sapuniki: “Ngudiang dadi kretannyane kasep pesan tekanne? Ngudiang dadi jarannyane tonden teka?”
Judges5:29 Panyeroannyane sane pinih duega raris nyaurin ipun
Judges5:30 “Ia ajaka wadua balannyane pada milih muah ngedum-edum jejarahan. Asing-asing prajurite maan anak luh bajang adiri wiadin duang diri. Panganggone ane paling melaha pabuat icening Sisera. Selendang ane masulam katur pabuat ida sang pramesuari.”
Judges5:31 Duh Ratu Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges6:1 Bangsa Israele malih ngardi dosa ring ayun Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges6:2 Bangsa Midiane punika kuatan ring bangsa Israele tur bangsa Israele ajerih ring ipun. Bangsa Israele tumuli pada mengkeb ring gua-guane wiadin ring genah-genahe sane aman ring bukit-bukite.
Judges6:3 Sabilang bangsa Israele nandur bibit
Judges6:4 Ipun raris ngwangun kemahipune irika
Judges6:5 Ipun pada rauh saha makta ingon-ingon miwah kemahipune
Judges6:6 tur bangsa Israele nenten mrasidayang nglawan ipun.
Judges6:7 Irika bangsa Israele raris masesambatan nunas pitulungan ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges6:8 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa raris ngutus nabi adiri ngrauhin ipun. Nabine punika mamuat sabdan Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges6:9 Ulun suba ngluputang kita uli sig wong Mesire
Judges6:10 Ulun ngorahin kita mungguing Ulun ene Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges6:11 Sasampune punika malaekat Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa raris rauh ring desa Opra
Judges6:12 Irika malaekat Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa raris mapakantenang raga ring dane
Judges6:13 Dane Gideon tumuli matur ring Ida sapuniki: “Inggih Ratu
Judges6:14 Irika Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges6:15 Dane Gideon tumuli matur sapuniki: “Nanging sapunapiang titiang jaga mebasang wong Israele? Palingsehan titiange
Judges6:16 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa ngandika sapuniki: “Kita nyidayang nglaksanayang unduke ento
Judges6:17 Dane Gideon raris matur sapuniki: “Yening Palungguh IRatu wiakti ledang ring titiang
Judges6:18 Ledang Palungguh IRatu meneng dumun iriki
Judges6:19 Irika Dane Gideon raris ngranjing ka jeroan danene ngratengang panak kambing asiki miwah ngambil tepung dasa kilogram kanggen roti tan paragi. Ulame punika wadahin dane sokasi miwah kuahnyane wadahin dane payuk
Judges6:20 Sang Malaekat ngandika ring dane sapuniki: “Pejang bene muah rotine ento di duur parangane ene
Judges6:21 Sasampune punika malaekat Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa tumuli nyujuh tur ngusud ulam miwah rotine punika antuk muncuk teteken sane bakta Ida. Irika raris medal geni saking batu kaange punika tur ngeseng ulam miwah rotine punika. Sasampune punika
Judges6:22 Irika Dane Gideon raris uning mungguing dane sampun ngaksi malaekat Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges6:23 Nanging Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa ngandika ring dane sapuniki: “Rahayuja kita. Edaja kita takut. Kita tusing lakar mati.”
Judges6:24 Irika Dane Gideon tumuli ngwangun pamorboran aturan ring genahe punika pabuat Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges6:25 Ring wengine punika Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa masabda ring Dane Gideon sapuniki: “Jemakja sampin bapan kitane
Judges6:26 Laut ngaeja pamorboran aturan ane melah pabuat Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges6:27 Irika Dane Gideon raris ngajak parekan danene dasa diri
Judges6:28 Benjang semengnyane rikala jadmane ring desane punika pada bangun
Judges6:29 Ipun raris pada saling takenin sapuniki: “Nyen ane malaksana buka kene ene?” Sasampun selidikin ipun raris uningin ipun mungguing Dane Gideon okan Dane Yoas sane nglaksanayang indike punika.
Judges6:30 Irika raris ipun mabaos ring Dane Yoas sapuniki: “Medalang okan ragane mriki pacang pademang tiang. Ipun sampun nguugang pamorboran aturan Dewa Baal miwah nektek turus lumbung Dewi Aserane sane ring sampingnyane.”
Judges6:31 Nanging Dane Yoas raris mabaos ring sakancan anake sane ngarepin dane sapuniki: “Punapike ragane maruang ring Baal? Punapi ragane jaga nindihin Baale punika? Asing-asing anak sane maruang ring Baal pacang kapademang sadurung semengan. Yen Baal punika widi banggayang ipun nindihin dewekipune niri. Puniki wantah pamorboran aturanipune kewanten sane kuugang.”
Judges6:32 Sasukat punika Dane Gideon raris kapesengin antuk anake akeh Yerubaal
Judges6:33 Sasampun punika sakancan wong Midian
Judges6:34 Roh Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa tumuli ngencegin Dane Gideon. Dane raris ngupin trompet buat nauhin anak saking palingsehan Abieser mangda ngiring dane.
Judges6:35 Dane ngutus utusan ka sakancan wewidangan suku Manasene sane dangin tukad miwah dauh Tukad Yordane
Judges6:36 Sasampune punika Dane Gideon raris matur ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa sapuniki: “Palungguh IRatu ngandikayang mungguing Palungguh IRatu sampun mastiang jaga nganggen titiang buat mebasang bangsa Israele.
Judges6:37 Inggih sane mangkin titiang jagi ngenahang makudang-kudang wol ring tanahe ring genah titiange nyosoh gandum. Yening benjang semeng wenten damuh wantah ring wole punika kewanten
Judges6:38 Kenginan raris sawiakti kasidan kadi asapunika. Benjangne pasemengan rikala Dane Gideon matangi
Judges6:39 Irika Dane Gideon matur malih ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa sapuniki: “Sampunangja Palungguh IRatu duka ring titiang. Icenja titiang matur malih apisan. Icenja titiang ngardi pepintonin malih apisan masrana wole punika. Sane mangkin mangda wole punika kewanten sane tuh
Judges6:40 Ring wengine punika Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa raris nglaksanayang indike punika. Benjang semengane
Judges7:1 Sedek rahina anu Dane Gideon miwah wadua balan danene sami pada matangi pasemengan
Judges7:2 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa masabda ring Dane Gideon sapuniki: “Waduane ane ajak kita ento bes liu buat Ulun
Judges7:3 Ane jani uar-uarang teken rakyate kene: ‘Asing-asing anak ane jejeh ia patut mulih
Judges7:4 Sasampune punika Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa masabda malih ring Dane Gideon
Judges7:5 Dane Gideon tumuli ngajak wadua balane tedun ka tukade tur Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa raris ngandika ring dane sapuniki: “Anehangja asing-asing anak ane nginem yeh aji layahne
Judges7:6 Irika raris wenten tigang atus anak sane nginum toya nyalud antuk limanipune raris koyot. Sane lianan makasami pada nginum toya sambilang ipun matedoh.
Judges7:7 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa raris ngandika ring Dane Gideon sapuniki: “Ulun lakar mebasang kita tur mapaica kamenangan teken kita nglawan wong Midiane ento aji anak telung atus ane nyalud tur ngoyot yeh aji limanne ento. Ane lenan ento makejang tunden ia mulih.”
Judges7:8 Irika Dane Gideon raris ngandikayang wong Israele sami pada budal
Judges7:9 Ring wengine puniki Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges7:10 Nanging yening kita jejeh magebug
Judges7:11 Kita lakar ningeh unduk ane raosanga teken musuhe
Judges7:12 Wong Midian
Judges7:13 Rikala Dane Gideon rauh irika
Judges7:14 Timpalipune tumuli masaur sapuniki: “Ento suba pedang Gideone pianak Yoase wong Israele ento. Tusingja lenan teken buka keto artin ipiane ento. Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa suba ngicen ia kamenangan nglawan wong Midiane muah sawatek wadua balan iragane.”
Judges7:15 Rikala Dane Gideon mireng ipian anake punika
Judges7:16 Dane raris ngepah waduan danene sane tigang atus punika dados tigang pasukan
Judges7:17 Dane raris ngandika ring ipun sapuniki: “Yen tiang suba neked di wates pakemahan musuhe
Judges7:18 Yen tiang muah pasukan tiange ngupin trompet
Judges7:19 Wau makire tengah wengi Dane Gideon miwah pasukan danene satus diri raris rauh ring wates pakemahan mesehe
Judges7:20 Pasukane kekalih sane lianan
Judges7:21 Dane miwah wadua balan danene sami pada majujuk ring genahnyane suang-suang ngilehin pakemahane punika
Judges7:22 Rikala wadua balan Dane Gideone ngupin trompetnyane
Judges7:23 Sasampune punika suku Naptali
Judges7:24 Dane Gideon raris ngutus anak ka sawewidangan pagunungan Epraime sami
Judges7:25 Ipun polih ngejuk ratun wong Midiane kekalih
Judges8:1 Sasampune punika suku Epraime raris mabaos ring Dane Gideon
Judges8:2 Nanging Dane Gideon masaur sapuniki: “Paindikan sane sampun margiang tiang punika
Judges8:3 Yadianja kadi asapunika kawentenannyane
Judges8:4 Daweg punika Dane Gideon miwah wadua balan danene tigang atus punika sampun rauh ring Tukad Yordane
Judges8:5 Rikala dane rauh ring Sukot
Judges8:6 Nanging pamimpin wong Sukote mabaos kadi asapuniki: “Napi awinannya tiang patut maang wadua balan ragane ajengan? Semeton durung nyidayang ngejuk Sebah miwah Salmuna.”
Judges8:7 Duaning punika Dane Gideon raris ngandika sapuniki: “Inggih! Yening Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa sampun nyerahang Sebah miwah Salmuna ring tiang
Judges8:8 Dane Gideon raris lunga ka Penuel
Judges8:9 Duaning punika Dane Gideon raris ngandika sapuniki: “Yen tiang mawali saha rahayu
Judges8:10 Sang Prabu Sebah miwah Sang Prabu Salmuna wenten ring Karkor kairing antuk wadua balan idane. Saking pantaran wadua balan suku-suku sane ring tegal melakange punika
Judges8:11 Dane Gideon mamargi nuluh margine ring sisin tegal melakange
Judges8:12 Ratun wong Midiane makakalih
Judges8:13 Rikala Dane Gideon mawali saking payudan nglintang ring margine munggah ka Heres
Judges8:14 dane ngejuk anak truna saking Sukot adiri
Judges8:15 Sasampune punika Dane Gideon raris lunga maranin jadmane ring Sukot
Judges8:16 Irika dane tumuli ngambil dui miwah ketket saking tegal melakange kanggen ngukum pamimpin-pamimpin wong Sukote.
Judges8:17 Dane taler nguugang menarane ring Penuel tur ngamademang jadmane ring kotane punika.
Judges8:18 Sasampune punika Dane Gideon raris mataken ring Sang Prabu Sebah miwah Salmuna
Judges8:19 Dane Gideon raris ngandika: “Anake punika makasami nyaman tiange
Judges8:20 Sasampune punika dane raris ngandika ring Dane Yeter
Judges8:21 Sasampune punika Sang Prabu Sebah miwah Salmuna mabaos ring Dane Gideon sapuniki: “Durusangja ragane ngraga sane ngamademang tiang. Indike punika mula dados tetegenan anak lanang.” Duaning punika Dane Gideon raris nyedayang sang kalih. Sasampune punika dane raris ngambil pepayasan sane kagantungang ring baong untan sang kalih punika.
Judges8:22 Wusan punika
Judges8:23 Dane Gideon raris masaur sapuniki: “Tiang nenten nyak dados pamrentah semetone
Judges8:24 Nanging sapanglanturipun dane raris ngandika sapuniki: “Wenten pinunas tiange asiki ring parasemeton. Semeton suang-suang mangda ledang micayang anting-anting jejarahan semetone ring tiang.” (Sakadi bangsa sane lianan
Judges8:25 Irika rakyate sami pada masaur sapuniki: “Saking manah liang
Judges8:26 Anting-anting mas sane katampi antuk Dane Gideon punika
Judges8:27 Dane Gideon tumuli makarya arca malakar antuk mas tur arcane punika genahang dane ring kota uedan danene
Judges8:28 Kadi asapunika indik wong Midiane kakaonang antuk wong Israele tur nenten malih wenten baya pabuat wong Israele. Jagate irika raris muponin kerta raharja ngantos petang dasa taun suenipun
Judges8:29 Dane Gideon raris mawali ka jeron danene tur jenek malinggih irika.
Judges8:30 Dane madue oka lanang-lanang pitung dasa diri
Judges8:31 Dane taler madue selir adiri ring Sikem. Selir danene punika madue oka lanang adiri mapesengan Abimelek.
Judges8:32 Dane Gideon okan Dane Yoas seda rikala dane sampun lingsir pisan
Judges8:33 Sasampune Dane Gideon seda
Judges8:34 tur ipun nenten malih nyungsung Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges8:35 Ipun pada nenten marasa suksma ring kulawargan Dane Gideon
Judges9:1 Dane Abimelek
Judges9:2 mangda dane mataken ring wong Sikeme punika: “Sane encen semeton senengan
Judges9:3 Palelintihan biang Dane Abimelek raris mabaos ring wong Sikeme ngeniang paindikan punika
Judges9:4 Ipun sareng sami ngaturang jinah perak pitung dasa bidang ring Dane Abimelek
Judges9:5 Dane raris lunga ka jeron ajin danene ring Opra
Judges9:6 Sasampun punika sawatek wong Sikem miwah Bet-Milone
Judges9:7 Rikala Dane Yotam mireng indike punika
Judges9:8 Sedek rahina anu soroh wit tarune pada mapunduh
Judges9:9 Irika wit saitune masaur kadi asapuniki: ‘Yening dados pamrentah parasemetone
Judges9:10 Sasampune punika sawatek tarune punika mabaos ring wit aane sapuniki: ‘Rarisang semeton dados ratun tiange sareng sami.’
Judges9:11 Nanging wit aane punika masaur sapuniki: ‘Yening tiang mrentah parasemeton
Judges9:12 Duaning punika ipun sareng sami raris mabaos ring wit anggure sapuniki: ‘Rarisang semeton dados ratun tiange sareng sami.’
Judges9:13 Nanging wit anggure punika masaur sapuniki: ‘Yening tiang mrentah parasemeton
Judges9:14 Duaning punika sawatek wit tarune sami mabaos ring bet duine
Judges9:15 Bet duine punika raris masaur sapuniki: ‘Yening parasemeton saking wiakti mapakayunan jaga nadosang tiang ratun semetone
Judges9:16 Dane Yotam malih nglanturang pangandikan danene
Judges9:17 Elingangja mungguing ajin tiange sampun mayuda pabuat semeton. Dane ngetohang jiwan danene buat ngluputang semeton saking wong Midiane.
Judges9:18 Nanging sane mangkin semeton mabalik nglawan kulawargan ajin tiange. Semeton nyedayang oka-okan danene pitung dasa diri ring duur batune sane asiki
Judges9:19 Duaning punika
Judges9:20 Nanging yening nenten wiakti kadi asapunika
Judges9:21 Sasampune punika
Judges9:22 Dane Abimelek mrentah wong Israele tigang taun suenipun.
Judges9:23 Sasampune punika Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa ngawinang Dane Abimelek miwah wong Sikeme pada saling mameseh-meseh
Judges9:24 Paindikan punika dados karma palan Dane Abimelek miwah wong Sikeme sane ngangsokang dane buat nyedayang okan Dane Gideon pitung dasa diri punika.
Judges9:25 Wong Sikeme ngenahang prajurit ring pucak-pucak gununge buat ngejuk Dane Abimelek
Judges9:26 Sasampune punika
Judges9:27 Ipun sareng sami pada medal ka abian angguripune tur ngalap woh anggur
Judges9:28 Dane Gaal raris mabaos sapuniki: “Anake sane sapunapike iraga sane ring Sikem puniki? Punapi awinannya iraga manjakin Abimelek? Sapasirake ipun punika? Ipun wantah panak Gideon
Judges9:29 Tiang meled pisan jaga nuntun rakyate puniki. Tiang jaga nyuudang Abimelek
Judges9:30 Dane Sebul pamrentah kotane punika raris kalintang duka
Judges9:31 Dane raris ngutus anak buat tangkil ring Dane Abimelek ring Aruma
Judges9:32 Duaning punika
Judges9:33 Benjang semengan rikala suryane sampun endag
Judges9:34 Irika Dane Abimelek miwah waduan danene makasami raris mamargi rikalaning wengi tur masingidan ring jaban kota Sikeme
Judges9:35 Rikala Dane Abimelek miwah waduan danene ngaksi Dane Gaal medal tur ngadeg ring gapuran kotane
Judges9:36 Dane Gaal ngaksi wadua balane punika
Judges9:37 Dane Gaal malih ngandika sapuniki: “Cingakinja! Punika wenten jadma tedun saking pucak gununge
Judges9:38 Sasampune punika Dane Sebul raris mabaos ring Dane Gaal sapuniki: “Sane mangkin dija baos ragane sane sesumbar punika? Ragane sane mataken
Judges9:39 Irika Dane Gaal tumuli mimpin wong Sikeme medal ka payudan tur nglawan Dane Abimelek.
Judges9:40 Dane Gaal jerih kapilayu
Judges9:41 Dane Abimelek jenek malinggih ring Aruma
Judges9:42 Benjangne Dane Abimelek uning mungguing wong Sikeme mamanah jaga pada medal ka tegale.
Judges9:43 Punika awinan dane munduhang waduan danene
Judges9:44 Risedek Dane Abimelek miwah pasukan danene malaib buat pacang nyaga gapuran kotane
Judges9:45 Yudane rames pisan ngantos arahina mepek. Dane Abimelek ngaonang kotane punika. Jadmannyane kapademang
Judges9:46 Rikala sakancan pamimpin sane wenten ring bentenge sane ring Sikem miragi indik punika
Judges9:47 Dane Abimelek mireng mungguing ipun sareng sami sampun mapunduh irika.
Judges9:48 Punika awinannya dane raris lunga ka Gunung Salmon kairing antuk waduan danene. Irika dane ngambil kapak
Judges9:49 Irika sawatek anake raris pada ngetep carang taru
Judges9:50 Sasampune punika Dane Abimelek raris lunga ka Tebes
Judges9:51 Ring kotane punika wenten menara sane kukuh bakuh tur sakancan wong kotane lanang wadon
Judges9:52 Rikala Dane Abimelek rauh jaga ngebug menarane punika
Judges9:53 Nanging wenten anak luh adiri ngentungang batu pangilesan ngenain duur danene
Judges9:54 Irika dane digelis ngesengin parekan sane ngambel sanjatan danene
Judges9:55 Rikala wong Israele manggihin mungguing Dane Abimelek sampun seda
Judges9:56 Kadi asapunika Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa ngwales kajaatan Dane Abimelek sane laksanayang dane marep ring ajin danene
Judges9:57 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa taler nibakang kasangsaran ring wong Sikeme malantaran kajaatanipune
Judges10:1 Sasampune Dane Abimelek seda
Judges10:2 Dane dados pamimpin bangsa Israele kantos tigalikur taun suenipun. Sasampune punika dane raris seda tur kaperemang ring Samir.
Judges10:3 Sasampun Dane Tola
Judges10:4 Dane madue oka lanang-lanang tigang dasa diri
Judges10:5 Dane Yair raris seda tur kaperemang ring Kamon.
Judges10:6 Bangsa Israele malih ngardi dosa pamantuka ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges10:7 Punika awinan Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa raris duka ring bangsa Israele
Judges10:8 Plekutus taun suenipun wong Pilistine miwah wong Amone punika nindes miwah nyangsarain sakancan wong Israele sane magenah ring panegaran wong Amorine sane dangin Tukad Yordane inggih punika ring Gilead.
Judges10:9 Malahan wong Amone taler nglintangin Tukad Yordan buat ngebug suku-suku Yehuda
Judges10:10 Sasampune punika bangsa Israele raris masesambatan nunas ica ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges10:11 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa tumuli masabda ring ipun sapuniki: “Ane malu wong Mesir
Judges10:12 wong Sidon
Judges10:13 Nanging kita enu masih nilar Ulun laut nyungsung widi-widi ane lenan. Sawireh keto
Judges10:14 Kemaja masesambatan tur nunas ica teken widi-widi ane suba pilih kita ento. Depang ia ane ngluputang kita
Judges10:15 Nanging bangsa Israele matur ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges10:16 Duaning punika ipun raris ngutang widi-widi sunantara punika
Judges10:17 Sasampune punika wadua balan wong Amone raris makinkin jaga mayuda
Judges10:18 Irika rakyat miwah parapamimpin suku-suku bangsa Israele pada saling takenin
Judges11:1 Dane Yepta prajurit sane sura dira saking Gilead. Dane punika pianak sundel
Judges11:2 Dane Gilead madue oka lanang-lanang sane lianan saking rabin danene sane sah. Rikala oka-okan danene punika sampun pada duur
Judges11:3 Dane Yepta raris minggat saking parasemeton danene
Judges11:4 Sasampune maletan makudang-kudang warsa
Judges11:5 Duk punika
Judges11:6 Sapuniki baos danene: “Rarisangja budal
Judges11:7 Nanging pasaur Dane Yepta
Judges11:8 Dane sareng sami raris matur ring Dane Yepta sapuniki: “Tiang sareng sami ngaturin semeton mawali sane mangkin
Judges11:9 Dane Yepta ngandika ring dane sareng sami
Judges11:10 Dane sareng sami raris masaur sapuniki: “Inggih tiang sairing. Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa makadados saksin iragane.”
Judges11:11 Duaning punika Dane Yepta raris ngiringang parapamimpin Gileade
Judges11:12 Sasampune punika Dane Yepta raris ngutus anak tangkil ring sang prabu ring Amon
Judges11:13 Sang prabu ring Amon nyaurin utusan Dane Yepta sapuniki: “Rikala bangsa Israele medal saking Mesir
Judges11:14 Dane Yepta ngwawanin malih ngutus anak tangkil ring sang prabu ring Amon
Judges11:15 saha kadulurin atur kadi asapuniki: “Nenten pisan wiakti mungguing bangsa Israele ngambil tanah Moab wiadin tanah Amone.
Judges11:16 Makasujatinipun
Judges11:17 Sasampune punika ipun raris ngutus anak tangkil ring sang prabu ring Edom
Judges11:18 Sasampune punika
Judges11:19 Sasampune punika bangsa Israele raris ngutus anak tangkil ring Ida Sang Prabu Sihon
Judges11:20 Nanging Ida Sang Prabu Sihon nenten nglugrain bangsa Israele. Ida raris munduhang wadua balan idane
Judges11:21 Nanging Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges11:22 Ipun ngaug sakuub wewidangan wong Amorine
Judges11:23 Dadosipun Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges11:24 Punapike iratu mapakayunan jaga ngindayang malih ngambil tanahe punika? Iratu dados ngamanggehang saluiring paindikan sane sampun kapaicayang ring iratu
Judges11:25 Punapike iratu mitaenang ragan iratune luihan ring Sang Prabu Balak okan Ida Sipor
Judges11:26 Tigang atus taun suenipun bangsa Israele sampun ngaug tur ngwengku kota Hesbon miwah Aroer
Judges11:27 Dadosipun
Judges11:28 Nanging sang prabu ring Amon nenten nglinguang atur Dane Yepta punika.
Judges11:29 Sasampune punika roh Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa raris ngencegin Dane Yepta. Dane raris lunga ka Gilead miwah Manase
Judges11:30 Dane Yepta raris masesangi ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges11:31 titiang jaga morbor makadados aturan anake sane pinih pangawit medal saking umah titiange buat mapagin titiang
Judges11:32 Irika Dane Yepta raris nglantur mamargi buat ngebug wong Amone
Judges11:33 Dane ngebug ipun saking Aroer
Judges11:34 Rikala Dane Yepta mantuk mawali ka Mispa
Judges11:35 Rikala dane ngaksi okan danene punika
Judges11:36 Okan danene raris matur ring dane sapuniki: “Yening aji sampun masesangi ring ayun Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges11:37 Nanging dane mapinunas ring ajin danene sapuniki: “Wenten pinunas tiange asiki. Icenja tiang masangke kalih sasih suenipun
Judges11:38 Dane Yepta nglugrain dane lunga
Judges11:39 Sasampune kalih sasih
Judges11:40 mungguing paradaane nyabran taun patut matilar saking umahnyane petang rahina suenipun
Judges12:1 Suku Epraime sampun sayaga jaga mayuda. Ipun sareng sami sampun nglintangin Tukad Yordane ngungsi ka Sapon
Judges12:2 Nanging Dane Yepta masaur ring ipun sareng sami
Judges12:3 Rikala panggihin tiang
Judges12:4 Irika Dane Yepta raris munduhang wong Gileade
Judges12:5 Mangda suku Epraime nenten mrasidayang jerih makelid
Judges12:6 ipun tumuli kakenken ngucapang “Syibolet”. Yening ipun ngucapang “Sibolet”
Judges12:7 Dane Yepta mimpin wong Israele kantos nem warsa suenipun. Sasampune punika dane raris seda
Judges12:8 Sasampune Dane Yepta
Judges12:9 Dane madue putra lanang-lanang tigang dasa diri
Judges12:10 Sasampune punika dane raris seda tur kaperemang ring Betlehem.
Judges12:11 Sasampun Dane Ebsan
Judges12:12 Sasampune punika dane raris seda tumuli kaperemang ring Ayalon ring wewidangan suku Sebulon.
Judges12:13 Sasampun Dane Elon
Judges12:14 Dane madue oka lanang-lanang petang dasa diri miwah putu lanang-lanang tigang dasa diri. Oka miwah putun danene asing-asing pada nglinggihin keledae. Dane Abdon mimpin bangsa Israele kutus taun suenipun.
Judges12:15 Sasampune punika dane raris seda tur kaperemang ring Piraton ring wewidangan suku Epraime
Judges13:1 Bangsa Israel malih ngardi dosa pamantuka ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa. Duaning punika Ida manggayang ipun kereh antuk wong Pilistin petang dasa taun suenipun.
Judges13:2 Duk punika wenten anak lanang mapesengan Manoah saking kota Sora. Dane punika warga suku Dan. Rabin danene bekung
Judges13:3 Malaekat Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa raris mapakantenang raga ring rabin danene
Judges13:4 Sawireh keto jaga dewek kitane eda pesan nginum anggur wiadin bir
Judges13:5 Sasubane pianak kitane lekad
Judges13:6 Sasampune punika anake istri punika raris nguningayang ring suaminnyane kadi asapuniki: “Utusan Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa sampun ngrauhin tiang
Judges13:7 Nanging dane sampun ngandikayang ring tiang
Judges13:8 Sasampune punika
Judges13:9 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa nagingin pinunas Dane Manoah tur malaekat Idane ngrauhin anake istri punika rikalaning dane malinggih ring tegale. Suamin danene
Judges13:10 Duaning punika digelis dane malaib tur matur ring suamin danene sapuniki: “Beli ngiringja cingakin! Anake sane ngrauhin tiang ipidan punika sane mangkin sampun rauh malih.”
Judges13:11 Dane Manoah digelis raris nututin rabin danene. Dane nganampekin anake lanang punika sarwi matur sapuniki: “Punapike ragane puniki anak sane sampun mabaos ring somah tiange?” Pasaur anake punika sapuniki: “Saja suba buka keto.”
Judges13:12 Irika Dane Manoah mataken
Judges13:13 Sang malaekat raris masaur
Judges13:14 Ia tusing dadi nginem anggur
Judges13:15 Dane Manoah nenten uning
Judges13:16 
Judges13:17 Dane Manoah raris matur sapuniki: “Nikayangja pesengan iratune ring titiang
Judges13:18 Sang malaekat raris ngandika
Judges13:19 Irika Dane Manoah raris ngambil pianak kambing aukud miwah gandum akidik
Judges13:20 Risedek genine ngendih murub ring pamorboran aturane punika
Judges13:21 
Judges13:22 Dane Manoah raris ngandika ring rabin danene
Judges13:23 Nanging rabin danene masaur sapuniki: “Yening Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa mapakayun ngamatiang iraga
Judges13:24 Nenten asue anake istri punika raris ngembasang rare lanang
Judges13:25 Samaliha roh Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa ngawitin nguatang dane
Judges14:1 Sedek rahina anu Dane Simson lunga ka Timna
Judges14:2 Dane tumuli mawali budal
Judges14:3 Nanging aji miwah biang danene raris mataken ring dane sapuniki: “Apa kranane cening ngalih kurenan wong Pilistin ane tuara nyungsung Widi ento? Apake cening tusing maan ngalih kurenan sig pantaran palelintihan muah di pantaran bangsan iragane?” Nanging Dane Simson matur ring ajin danene sapuniki: “Wantah ipun kewanten sane tunas tiang mangda aji ledangja ngrereh ipun buat tiang. Tiang demen ring ipun.”
Judges14:4 Aji miwah biang danene nenten uning
Judges14:5 Duaning punika Dane Simson raris lunga ka Timna kasarengin antuk aji miwah biang danene. Rikala sang tiga mamargi nglintangin abian anggur
Judges14:6 Tan pararapan kawisesan saking Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa raris ngencegin Dane Simson tur ngawinang dane siteng. Irika dane raris mukang-mukang singane punika antuk tangan danene
Judges14:7 Sasampune punika dane raris mamargi tur mabaos ring anake bajang punika duaning dane seneng ring ipun.
Judges14:8 Maletan makudang-kudang rahina Dane Simson malih mawali mrika buat jaga nganten ngajak anake bajang punika. Ring margi dane raris simpang ring genah singane sane sampun pademang dane punika
Judges14:9 Dane tumuli ngambil madune punika raris kajengang sambilang dane mamargi. Sasampune punika dane raris nganampekin aji miwah biang danene
Judges14:10 Ajin danene tumuli mamadik daane punika
Judges14:11 Rikala wong Pilistine manggihin dane
Judges14:12 Dane Simson tumuli ngandika ring paratrunane punika sapuniki: “Sane mangkin tiang ngaturin semeton cecimpedan asiki. Yening sajeroning pitung rahina sakantun pestane puniki semeton mrasidayang nyemped cecimpedane punika
Judges14:13 
Judges14:14 Dane Simson tumuli ngandika sapuniki: “Saking jeroning sang ngajengang medal ajeng-ajengan. Saking sang sane siteng medal barang sane manis.” Sasampune lintang tigang rahina ipun sareng sami kantun nenten mrasidayang nyemped cecimpedane punika.
Judges14:15 Ring rahina sane kaping pat ipun raris mabaos ring rabin Dane Simson asapuniki: “Lelunyuhinja kurenan luhe
Judges14:16 Irika rabin Dane Simson raris nganampekin dane sarwi matur maduluran tangis kadi asapuniki: “Beli nenten sujati tresna ring tiang. Beli sujatinne geting ring tiang. Beli ngicen timpal-timpal tiange cecimpedan
Judges14:17 Sajeroning pitung rahina
Judges14:18 Duaning punika
Judges14:19 Tan dumade kawisesan Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa tumuli nedunin dane
Judges14:20 Matuan danene tumuli nyerahang rabin danene ring sawitran Dane Simson sane pinih raket ring dane sajeroning pestane punika.
Judges15:1 Sasampune maletan makudang-kudang rahina
Judges15:2 Matuan danene raris mabaos ring Dane Simson
Judges15:3 Dane Simson tumuli mabaos sapuniki: “Sane mangkin tiang nentenja iwang malantaran saluiring paindikan sane laksanayang tiang marep ring wong Pilistine.”
Judges15:4 Duaning punika dane raris lunga tur ngejuk asu alasan tigang atus akehipun. Sabilang kekalih asune punika raris sambung dane ikut ipune dados asiki
Judges15:5 Sasampune punika obore punika nyitin dane
Judges15:6 Rikala wong Pilistine mataken sapasira sane nglaksanayang paindikane punika
Judges15:7 Dane Simson raris mabaos ring wong Pilistine punika
Judges15:8 Dane tumuli ngamuk ipun sareng sami
Judges15:9 Irika wong Pilistine raris rauh tur ngwangun pakemahannyane ring wewidangan Yehudane tur ngebug kota Lehi.
Judges15:10 Jadmane sane ring Yehuda tumuli mataken ring ipun sapuniki: “Napi awinannya ragane ngebug tiang?” Wong Pilistine tumuli masaur sapuniki: “Tiang rauh jagi ngejuk tur negul Simson. Sapunapija laksanannyane marep ring tiang
Judges15:11 Duaning punika
Judges15:12 Ipun sareng sami raris mabaos sapuniki: “Tiang rauh mriki buat jaga ngejuk tur negul semeton
Judges15:13 Ipun sareng sami raris masaur sapuniki: “Inggih tiang majanji
Judges15:14 Rikala dane rauh ring Lehi
Judges15:15 Sasampune punika dane raris polih tulang panggal keledae sane wau pisan padem. Dane tumuli nguntul tur ngambil tulange punika
Judges15:16 Sasampune punika Dane Simson raris makidung sapuniki: “Antuk tulang panggal keledae
Judges15:17 Sasampune punika tulang panggal keledaene punika raris entungang dane. Punika awinanipun genahe punika raris kawastanin Ramat-Lehi.
Judges15:18 Sasampune punika Dane Simson raris rumasa kasatan pisan. Duaning punika dane raris nunas ica ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges15:19 Irika Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa raris ngwentenang bulakan ring tanahe ring Lehi
Judges15:20 Dane Simson mimpin bangsa Israele kalih dasa taun suenipun
Judges16:1 Sedek rahina anu Dane Simson raris lunga ka kotan wong Pilistine sane mawasta Gasa. Irika dane matemu ring anak istri panayang adiri
Judges16:2 Jadmane ring Gasa raris uning
Judges16:3 Nanging Dane Simson wantah rauh tengah wengi kewanten ring pamereman. Sasampune punika dane raris matangi. Dane tumuli ngancit gapuran kotane punika
Judges16:4 Wusan punika
Judges16:5 Irika pararatun wong Pilistine sareng lelima raris ngrauhin anake luh punika
Judges16:6 Irika Delila raris mabaos ring Dane Simson sapuniki: “Indayangja nikayang ring tiang
Judges16:7 Dane Simson raris masaur: “Yening ia negul beli aji tali pamentangan panah ane anyar
Judges16:8 Duaning punika pararatun wong Pilistine raris maicayang tali pamentangan panah sane durung tuh pitung katih ring Delila
Judges16:9 Ipun ngenken makudang-kudang anak nyantosang ring kamar sane lianan
Judges16:10 Delila malih matur ring Dane Simson sapuniki: “Nah beli sampun melog-melog tiang
Judges16:11 Pasaur danene
Judges16:12 Irika Delila raris ngrereh tali anyar makudang-kudang katih
Judges16:13 Delila raris matur ring Dane Simson
Judges16:14 Irika Delila raris nylikuin dane mangda dane sirep
Judges16:15 Duaning punika Delila raris matur ring dane
Judges16:16 Nyabran rahina ipun nenten wus-wusan nakenang indike punika ring dane
Judges16:17 Pamuputipun
Judges16:18 Rikala Delila uning mungguing dane sampun ngandikayang sane amun sujatinne ring ipun
Judges16:19 Delila raris nglelunyuhin Dane Simson mangda dane sirep ring pabinan ipune. Sasampune punika ipun ngaukin anak adiri buat ngetep rambut Dane Simson sane mapusungan pepitu punika. Sasampune punika ipun raris ngawitin nyakitin dane
Judges16:20 Wusan punika
Judges16:21 Wong Pilistine tumuli ngejuk dane
Judges16:22 Nanging rambut danene raris ngawitin mentik malih.
Judges16:23 Pararatun wong Pilistine raris pada paum buat jaga ngwentenang piodalan miwah aturan sane ageng ring dewan idane inggih punika Dewa Dagon. Ida miwah kaulan idane pada makidung sapuniki: “Widin iragane suba mapaica kamenangan teken iraga marep teken musuh iragane I Simson.”
Judges16:24 Ida sareng sami kalintang ledang ring kayun
Judges16:25 
Judges16:26 Dane Simson tumuli ngandika ring anake alit sane nandan dane
Judges16:27 Balene punika bek pisan madaging jadma lanang istri. Pararatun wong Pilistine makalelima pada wenten irika
Judges16:28 Irika Dane Simson tumuli ngastawa sapuniki: “Duh Ratu Sang Hyang Widi Wasa Sane Maha Wisesa
Judges16:29 Irika Dane Simson raris mlekuk adegane ring basan tengah umahe punika makakalih. Tangan danene tengen ngambil asiki
Judges16:30 sarwi nyerit kadi asapuniki: “Depang suba idewek mati ajak wong Pilistine.” Dane nyogok adegan punika amun kereng danene
Judges16:31 Parasemeton danene miwah kulawargan danene raris pada rauh ngambil layon danene. Layon danene kabakta mawali budal tur kaperemang ring pantaran kota Sora miwah kota Estaole
Judges17:1 Kacrita wenten anak mapesengan Mika
Judges17:2 Sedek rahina anu dane mabaos ring biang danene sapuniki: “Daweg wenten anak mamaling jinah perak memene sane siu satus bidang
Judges17:3 Dane raris ngwaliang jinahe punika ring biang danene. Biang danene raris ngandika sapuniki: “Buat muungang temahe ento
Judges17:4 Sasampune punika
Judges17:5 Dane Mika madue satunggiling genah mabakti. Dane makarya makudang-kudang arca miwah kawaca epod
Judges17:6 Duk masane punika nenten wenten ratu sane madeg ring Israel. Asing-asing anak pada ngamargiang sapakitannyane niri.
Judges17:7 Daweg masane punika taler wenten anak truna suku Lewi
Judges17:8 Dane kesah saking Betlehem buat ngulati genah madunungan ring genahe sane lianan. Rikalaning dane mamargi
Judges17:9 Dane Mika tumuli nakenin dane sapuniki: “Semeton rauh saking dija?” Pasaur danene
Judges17:10 Dane Mika raris ngandika sapuniki: “Ledang semeton meneng iriki sareng-sareng ring tiang. Ledang semeton dados panasehat miwah panditan tiange. Tiang jaga ngaturin semeton nyabran taun
Judges17:11 Anak truna suku Lewi punika tumuli ledang malinggih irika sareng Dane Mika
Judges17:12 Dane Mika raris ngadegang anake truna punika dados panditan danene
Judges17:13 Dane Mika tumuli ngandika sapuniki: “Ane jani idewek ngelah anak Lewi dadi panditan ideweke. Pedas Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa lakar asung lugraha teken idewek.”
Judges18:1 Duk masane punika nenten wenten prabu ring pantaran bangsa Israele. Daweg punika suku Dan ngulati tanah wewidangan buat genahnyane magumana
Judges18:2 Duaning punika suku Dan raris nyelik anak sane sura dira limang diri saking asing-asing kulawarga sajeroning suku Dan
Judges18:3 Risedek ipun wenten irika
Judges18:4 Dane raris masaur sapuniki: “Tiang maderbe prajanjian ring Dane Mika. Dane ngupahin tiang dados panditan danene.”
Judges18:5 Utusane punika raris mabaos ring wong Lewi punika sapuniki: “Indayang tunasang ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa punapike tiang jaga labda karya sajeroning pamargin tiange puniki.”
Judges18:6 Sang pandita tumuli masaur
Judges18:7 Sasampune punika utusane lelima punika raris kesah tur mamargi ngungsi kota Lais. Irika panggihin ipun mungguing rakyate irika pada muponin kerta raharja sakadi wong Sidone. Ipun rakyat sane sutrepti rahayu
Judges18:8 Rikala utusane lelima punika mawali ka Sora miwah Estaol
Judges18:9 Pasauripune sapuniki: “Mrikija! Ngiring gebug kota Laise. Jagate punika panggihin tiang kalintang becik. Sampunang kliad-kliud
Judges18:10 Yening semeton sampun rauh irika
Judges18:11 Duaning punika raris wenten anak sareng tigang atak saking suku Dan kesah saking kota Sora miwah Estaol
Judges18:12 Ipun raris mamargi tur ngwangun pakemahannyane ring Kiryat-Yearim ring Yehuda. Punika awinannya rauh mangkin genahe punika kawastanin Pakemahan Dan.
Judges18:13 Ipun raris kesah saking irika tur rauh ring jeroan Dane Mika ring Pagunungan Epraim.
Judges18:14 Irika utusane lelima sane sampun nyelehin kota-kota sakiwa tengen kota Laise punika
Judges18:15 Irika ipun raris mamargi ka jeroan Dane Mika
Judges18:16 Daweg punika prajurite tigang atak saking suku Dan
Judges18:17 Mata-matane sareng lelima punika ngraris ngranjing ka jeroan
Judges18:18 Rikala utusane punika ngranjing ka jeroan Dane Mika
Judges18:19 Pasaur parautusane punika sapuniki: “Menengja semeton
Judges18:20 Indike punika ngawinang sang pandita liang pisan. Punika awinan dane raris ngambil barange sane suci punika raris lunga nyarengin anake akeh punika.
Judges18:21 Wong Dane punika raris nglanturang pamargi kasarengin antuk pianak-pianak
Judges18:22 Ipun sampun mamargi doh saking jeroan Dane Mika. Dane Mika raris ngaukin pisaga-pisagan danene buat jaga mayuda. Dane ngepung jadmane sane saking Dan punika
Judges18:23 sinambi jerit-jerit ngaukin ipun. Jadma suku Dane punika raris matolihan tur mataken ring Dane Mika
Judges18:24 Dane Mika raris masaur sapuniki: “Sampunang semeton mapi-mapi tan uning! Semeton ngambil panditan tiange miwah dewa-dewa sane kardi tiang
Judges18:25 Jadma suku Dane punika raris mabaos sapuniki: “Becikan semeton sampunang maosang punapa-punapi mangda sampunang jadmane sareng akeh punika ngantos pedih tur ngebug semeton
Judges18:26 Sasampune punika ipun raris nglantur mamargi. Dane Mika ngaksi mungguing anake akeh punika kalintang kuat bandingan ring dane. Duaning punika dane raris mawali mantuk.
Judges18:27 Sasampun jadmane sane saking suku Dan punika ngambil pandita miwah barang-barang sane kakardi antuk Dane Mika
Judges18:28 
Judges18:29 Wastan kotane punika raris kagentosin dados: Dan
Judges18:30 Jadma suku Dan punika raris ngadegang arcane punika
Judges18:31 Arcan Dane Mika punika kantun tetep wenten irika
Judges19:1 Duk masane punika
Judges19:2 Nanging anake luh punika raris pedih ring dane
Judges19:3 Wong Lewine punika raris mapikayun jagi ngetut ipun
Judges19:4 Bapannyane ngidih banget pisan
Judges19:5 Ring rahina sane kaping pat
Judges19:6 Irika wong Lewi miwah matuannyane tumuli sareng-sareng majengan miwah nginum. Wusan punika bapan anake luh punika tumuli mabaos ring dane sapuniki: “Nginepja cening buin apeteng tur lipurangja keneh ceninge.”
Judges19:7 Wong Lewine punika raris matangi jaga mamargi
Judges19:8 Ring rahina sane kaping lima
Judges19:9 Rikala wong Lewi
Judges19:10 Nanging wong Lewine punika nenten kayun malih ngrerep irika
Judges19:11 
Judges19:12 Nanging pamekelnyane ngandika sapuniki: “Iraga tusingja lakar mareren di kota ane katongosin baan anak ane tidong wong Israel. Iraga lakar nglanturang majalan buin abedik
Judges19:13 
Judges19:14 Duaning punika dane raris nglintangin kota Yebuse tur nglanturang pamargin danene. Rikala dane rauh ring Gibea
Judges19:15 Dane tumuli simpang ring kotane punika buat jaga marerepan irika. Dane ngranjing ka kotane punika tur malinggih ring alun-alun kotane
Judges19:16 Risedek dane wenten irika
Judges19:17 Anak odah punika manggihin wong Lewine punika ring tanah lapang kotane
Judges19:18 Wong Lewine punika raris masaur sapuniki: “Tiang pecak luas ka Betlehem ring Yehuda
Judges19:19 Yadiastun tiang makta sumi miwah tetedan buat keledaen tiange
Judges19:20 Anake odah punika raris mabaos sapuniki: “Rarisangja simpang ka umah tiange. Tiang jaga nulungin ragane. Sampunangja ragane makolem ring tanah lapang kotane.”
Judges19:21 Irika anake odah punika raris ngajak dane sareng selir miwah parekan danene ka umahipune
Judges19:22 Risedek dane pada maliang-liang
Judges19:23 Nanging anake odah punika raris medal tur mabaos ring ipun sapuniki: “Edaja keto cening. Edaja cening nyalanang laksana ane dursila. Anake ene tamiun bapane.
Judges19:24 Tingalinja! Ene selirnyane muah pianak bapane luh ane enu bajang genten. Ia makadadua jani lakar pesuang bapa
Judges19:25 Nanging anake punika nenten nyak madingehang munyin anake odah punika. Duaning punika wong Lewine punika raris ngajak selirnyane medal tur kaserahang ring anake punika. Anake punika raris mlegandang miwah mlegendahang ipun awengi mepek
Judges19:26 Rikala galang kangin
Judges19:27 Pasemengan kurenannyane matangi
Judges19:28 Dane raris ngandika sapuniki: “Bangunja! Jalan jani majalan!” Nanging nenten wenten pasaur angan abuku. Irika dane raris ngangkat ipun tur kagenahang ngandang ring tundun keledaene
Judges19:29 Sasampune dane rauh ring jeroan danene
Judges19:30 Asing-asing anak sane manggihin indike punika
Judges20:1 Sawatek bangsa Israele
Judges20:2 Parapamimpin sakancan suku-suku Israele sami pada rauh ring pepunduhan kaulan Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa punika
Judges20:3 Duk punika wong Benyamine miragi mungguing suku-suku Israel sane lianan makasami sampun mapunduh ring Mispa. Wong Israele raris pada mataken sapuniki: “Tuturangja ring tiang sareng sami
Judges20:4 Wong Lewi sane selirnyane kapademang punika raris masaur sapuniki: “Selir tiange miwah tiang mrika ka Gibea ring wewidangan Benyamine
Judges20:5 Anake irika raris rauh jaga ngebug tiang tur ngurung umah genah tiange madunungan rikalaning wengi. Ipun mamanah ngamademang tiang
Judges20:6 Sawanipune ambil tiang
Judges20:7 Semeton sareng sami puniki bangsa Israel. Punapike sane patut margiang iraga ngeniang ring paindikane punika?”
Judges20:8 Rakyate punika makasami raris bangun sinarengan tur mabaos sapuniki: “Iraga sareng sami puniki yadian sane magenah ring kemahe wiadin sane magenah ring umahe nenten wenten sane jaga budal.
Judges20:9 Kadi asapuniki sane jaga margiang iraga. Iraga jaga mulang undi tur milih makudang-kudang anak buat magagebug ka Gibea.
Judges20:10 Apahdasan saking jadmane ring Israel
Judges20:11 Irika sawatek jadmane ring Israel sami mapunduh saha nunggal pangapti inggih punika jaga ngebug kotane punika.
Judges20:12 Suku-suku Israele raris ngutus anak ngrauhin wewidangan suku Benyamine makasami
Judges20:13 Sane mangkin serahangja sawatek jadmane sane jaat ring Gibea
Judges20:14 Saking sakancan kota Benyamine ipun sami pada rauh ring Gibea buat jaga mayuda nglawan suku-suku Israel sane lianan.
Judges20:15 Ring rahinane punika ipun munduhang prajurit 26.000 akehipun saking kota-kotanipune. Sajaba punika
Judges20:16 
Judges20:17 Suku-suku Israel sane lianan munduhang prajurit sane sampun nyaya 400.000 akehipun.
Judges20:18 Bangsa Israele raris mamargi ka genah pangubaktine ring Betel
Judges20:19 Duaning punika
Judges20:20 Ipun mamargi jaga ngebug wadua balan wong Benyamine
Judges20:21 Wadua balan wong Benyamine raris medal saking kota
Judges20:22 Sasampune punika wong Israele tumuli ngungsi genah pangubaktine
Judges20:23 
Judges20:24 Ring rahina sane kaping kalihipun
Judges20:25 Tur ring rahinane punika wong Benyamin medal saking kota Gibea tur duk punika ipun ngamademang prajurit-prajurit Israele sane sampun nyaya 18.000 akehipun.
Judges20:26 Sasampune punika
Judges20:27 Daweg punika Peti Prajanjian Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa wenten ring Betel
Judges20:28 
Judges20:29 Duaning punika wong Israele raris ngenahang makudang-kudang prajurit mengkeb ring saileh kota Gibeane.
Judges20:30 Sasampune punika ring rahina sane kaping tiga
Judges20:31 Wong Benyamine raris medal ka payudan kantos doh saking kota. Sakadi sane sampun-sampun ipun ngawitin ngamademang makudang-kudang wong Israel ring genahe sane jimbar
Judges20:32 Wong Benyamine pada mabaos sapuniki: “Iraga suba ngalahang ia buka ane suba-suba.” Nanging wong Israele sampun ngrencanayang jaga makirig ngawinang wong Benyamine punika medal doh saking kota
Judges20:33 Duaning punika
Judges20:34 Wenten dasa tali akehipun
Judges20:35 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa mapaica kamenangan ring bangsa Israele nglawan wadua balan wong Benyamine. Ring rahinane punika bangsa Israele ngamademang meseh 25.100 akehipun
Judges20:36 tur wong Benyamine raris uning mungguing ipun sampun kakaonang. Induk pasukan wadua balan Israele sampun mundur saking ajeng wong Benyamine
Judges20:37 Prajurit-prajurite punika digelis malaib ngungsi kota Gibea. Ipun pada sumebar ring kota
Judges20:38 Induk pasukan wadua balan Israele miwah prajurit-prajurite sane mengkeb punika sampun ngwentenang pasubaya
Judges20:39 bangsa Israel sane mundur saking payudan patut mabalik.” Daweg punika wong Benyamine sampun ngamademang wong Israel tigang dasa akehipun. Ipun pada mabaos sapuniki: “Iraga suba ngalahang ia buka ane suba-suba.”
Judges20:40 Irika raris kanten tandane punika
Judges20:41 Irika wong Israel sami mabalik
Judges20:42 Ipun sami pada mundur saking arepan bangsa Israele
Judges20:43 Bangsa Israele sampun meletin meseh-mesehnyane tur tan rarianan ipun ngepung tur ngamademang meseh ngantos rauh ring genahe dangin kota Gibeane.
Judges20:44 Wenten 18.000 akehipun prajurit-prajurit wong Benyamine sane pinih becika kapademang.
Judges20:45 Sisannyane sami jerih tur malaib ngungsi ka tegale ring bukit batu Rimone. Wenten 5.000 akehipun kapademang sapanjang margine irika. Wong Israele nglanturang ngepung sisannyane ngantos rauh ring Gideom
Judges20:46 Ring rahinane punika makasami wenten 25.000 akehipun wong Benyamine sane kapademang tur makasami prajurit-prajurit sane sura dira.
Judges20:47 Nanging wenten tigang atak akehipun sane mrasidayang malaib ngluputang deweknyane ring tegale ring bukit batu Rimone
Judges20:48 Bangsa Israel raris mawali ngebug sisan wong Benyamin tur ngamademang jadmane makasami lanang wadon agung alit
Judges21:1 Rikala bangsa Israele sampun mapunduh ring Mispa
Judges21:2 Duaning asapunika
Judges21:3 “Ratu Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges21:4 Benjangne pasemengan pisan rakyate raris ngwangun pamorboran aturan irika tumuli ngaturang aturan maborbor miwah aturan karahayuan.
Judges21:5 Ipun sareng sami raris pada mataken asapuniki: “Punapike wenten saking pantaran bangsa Israele sane nenten sareng mapunduh ring ayun Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa ring Mispa?” (Ipun sareng sami sampun masumpah
Judges21:6 Bangsa Israele raris rumasa kangen ring nyamanipune suku Benyamin tumuli ipun raris mabaos sapuniki: “Ring rahina puniki bangsa Israele sampun kicalan suku bangsannyane asiki.
Judges21:7 Sapunapi mangkin antuk nabdab buat nyediang somah pabuat wong Benyamine sane kantun urip. Iraga sampun masumpah ring ayun Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Judges21:8 Rikala ipun pada nakenang
Judges21:9 Rikala wadua balane kasambat wastanipune suang-suang
Judges21:10 Duaning punika parumane punika raris ngutus prajurit-prajurit sane sura dira roras tali akehipun
Judges21:11 Pademangja sawatek sane muani miwah jadmane sane luh-luh sane nenten kantun bajang genten.”
Judges21:12 Ring pantaran jadmane sane ring Yabes
Judges21:13 Sasampune punika parumane punika raris ngutus anak buat ngrauhin wong Benyamine sane wenten ring Gunung Batu Rimone
Judges21:14 Wong Benyamine raris pada mawali budal
Judges21:15 Rakyate sami raris marasa kangen ring wong Benyamine
Judges21:16 Duaning punika pamimpin-pamimpin parumane punika tumuli mabaos sapuniki: “Ring pantaran suku-suku Benyamine nenten wenten malih anak luh. Napike sane patut laksanayang iraga buat nyediang somah pabuat jadmane sane kantun punika?
Judges21:17 Bangsa Israele nenten patut ngutang salah tunggil saking suku bangsane sane roras punika. Iraga patut ngrereh margi buat suku Benyamine mangda ipun kantun nutugang katurunannyane.
Judges21:18 Nanging iraga nenten ngwehin ipun nyuang pianak iragane sane luh-luh santukan iraga sampun nibakang temah ring asing-asing anak saking pantaran iragane sane malilayang pianak-pianakipune luh kajuang antuk wong Benyamine.”
Judges21:19 Sasampune punika ipun raris mabaos kadi asapuniki: “Rerainan sane anggen iraga ngluihang Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa nyabran taun ring Silo
Judges21:20 Ipun raris mabaos ring wong Benyamine
Judges21:21 tur jantosangja irika. Rikala bajang-bajange saking Silo pada medal masolah ring rerainane punika
Judges21:22 Yen wenten bapa wiadin nyamannyane sane ngrauhin tur mlungguh semeton
Judges21:23 Wong Benyamine raris nglaksanayang paindikane punika. Ipun suang-suang raris milih somah saking pantaran bajang-bajange sane masolah ring Silo
Judges21:24 Duk punika wong Israele sane lianan raris pada kesah saking irika
Judges21:25 Duk masane punika nenten wenten prabu madeg ring pantaran bangsa Israele. Asing-asing anake pada malaksana manut pakitannyane suang-suang.
Ruth1:1 Sane nguni
Ruth1:2 
Ruth1:3 Nenten asue
Ruth1:4 Pianakipune makakalih ngambil anak luh bangsa Moab. Sane kelihan mawasta Orpa
Ruth1:5 Mahlon miwah Kilyon taler padem. Sane mangkin kantun Naomi katinggal antuk kurenan miwah pianakipune makakalih.
Ruth1:6 Sedek rahina anu Naomi mamanah jaga budal saking panegara Moab kasarengin antuk mantunipune makakalih. Santukan ring Moab ipun miragi mungguing Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa sampun nyuryanin kaulan Idane malantaran mapaica pamupon sane becik.
Ruth1:7 Naomi miwah mantunipune makakalih tumuli kesah saking irika
Ruth1:8 Ring margi Naomi raris mabaos ring mantun ipune makakalih sapuniki: “Kemaja cening pada mulih ka umah memen ceninge. Dumadak Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa maicayang sih pasuecan Idane teken cening
Ruth1:9 Dumadakja uli krana panugrahan Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Ruth1:10 sarwi mabaos asapuniki: “Tiang nenten sairing. Tiang jaga nututin meme budal ngulati bangsan memene.”
Ruth1:11 Naomi tumuli masaur: “Mulihja cening ajak dadua
Ruth1:12 Nah kema cening majalan mulih sawireh yen buat makurenan
Ruth1:13 sinah cening tuara nyidaang lakar ngantiang kantos ia kelih. Edaja ulihan ento cening lantas ngeret budi tur tusing ngalih kurenan. Nah eda keto cening
Ruth1:14 Sang kalih malih ngeling gerong-gerong. Ni Orpa raris ngaras matuannyane tumuli mapamit. Nanging Rut tetep leket ring matuannyane.
Ruth1:15 Naomi raris mabaos ring Rut kadi asapuniki: “Ipah ceninge suba mulih ngulati bangsa muah paradewannyane. Kemaja cening mulih nututin ia!”
Ruth1:16 Nanging Rut masaur asapuniki: “Sampunang meme maksa tiang buat budal nilarin meme. Banggayang tiang sareng-sareng ring meme. Kijaja meme lunga
Ruth1:17 Ring dijaja meme seda
Ruth1:18 Rikala Naomi uning mungguing Rut puguh jaga nututin ipun
Ruth1:19 Sang kalih tumuli mamargi kantos rauh ring Betlehem. Rikala sang kalih sampun rauh irika
Ruth1:20 Nanging Naomi masaur asapuniki: “Sampunangja ngwastanin tiang Naomi. Wastaninja tiang Mara! Santukan Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa sampun manggayang tiang nandang duhkita banget pisan.
Ruth1:21 Rikala tiang kesah saking iriki
Ruth1:22 Kadi asapunika indiknyane Naomi budal saking Moab
Ruth2:1 Naomi maderbe palelintihan ulihan kurenannyane Elimelek
Ruth2:2 Sedek rahina anu
Ruth2:3 Rut raris mamargi ka tegale tur munuh gandum ring ungkur anake ngampung. Daweg punika ipun katuju ring tegalan Boase.
Ruth2:4 Tan asue Boas raris rauh saking Betlehem. Ipun nyapa paderepe makasami kadi asapuniki: “Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa ngiangin nyama!” Paderepe tumuli masaur: “Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa ngamertanin mekele.”
Ruth2:5 Boas raris mataken ring rencangnyane sane ngenterang paderepe punika
Ruth2:6 Rencangnyane tumuli matur: “Anake luh puniki saking Moab. Ipun rauh mriki sareng-sareng Naomi sane wau budal saking Moab.
Ruth2:7 Iwau ipun sampun ngidih ring tiang sapuniki: ‘Icenja tiang munuh gandum ring ungkur paderepe punika.’ Ipun sampun makarya saking semengan pisan
Ruth2:8 Sasampune punika Boas raris mabaos ring Rut sapuniki: “Luh
Ruth2:9 Tingalinja
Ruth2:10 Rut raris matimpuh tur sumungkem
Ruth2:11 Pasaur Boase: “Tiang suba ningeh orta unduk tresnan luhe teken matuan luhe sasubane kurenan luhe mati. Aketo masih unduk luhe ngalahin meme bapan luhe muah gumi palekadan luhe
Ruth2:12 Dumadak Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa ngwales laksanan luhe ento
Ruth2:13 Rut tumuli matur sapuniki: “Saking yuakti titiang polih sih kapiolasan saking pamekele
Ruth2:14 Rikala masan anake mararian tur majengan
Ruth2:15 Sasampune ipun bangun jaga munuh
Ruth2:16 Malahan patut nyama nyelapang ngedeng tur ngutang abedik-abedik uli peselan gandume ento apang duduka.”
Ruth2:17 Kantos sore Rut munuh ring tegale punika. Gandumnyane tumuli katapinin
Ruth2:18 Gandume punika raris kabakta budal ka kota. Daweg matuannyane manggihin unuhe punika
Ruth2:19 matuannyane mataken sapuniki: “Dija cening maan munuh gandume ene? Di tegalan nyenne cening munuh? Dumadak Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa ngamertanin anake ane olas teken cening!” Rut raris nyritayang ring matuannyane mungguing ipun munuh ring tegal anake sane mawasta Boas.
Ruth2:20 Sasampune punika Naomi raris mabaos sapuniki: “Dumadak Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa ngamertanin Boas. Ida setata ngamanggehang janjin Idane teken anake ane idup muah teken anake ane mati.” Naomi malih nglanturang baosnyane sapuniki: “Anake ento salah tunggal uli nyaman iragane saling kodag ane pantes ngrunguang iraga.”
Ruth2:21 Rut raris mabaos ring Naomi asapuniki: “Anake punika taler mabaos ring tiang mangda tiang tetep munuh irika nyarengin paraburuhnyane
Ruth2:22 Naomi raris mabaos ring Rut sapuniki: “Cening
Ruth2:23 Kadi asapunika indiknyane Rut munuh nyabran rahina sareng-sareng ring buruh-buruh Boase sane luh-luh kantos Boas wusan ngampung. Daweg punika Rut kantun sareng ring dunungan matuannyane.
Ruth3:1 Sedek rahina anu
Ruth3:2 Cening suba nawang Boas ane ngelah tegal gandume sig tongos ceninge munuh nututin buruhe ane luh-luh. Ia enu manyama saling kodag ngajak iraga. Ane jani padingehangja munyin memene. Nyanan sanjane ia lakar nyosoh gandumne di tegalane.
Ruth3:3 Sawireh keto kemaja cening manjus laut saluk bajune ane paling melaha tur kema anggonin ibane miik-miikan. Nanging tekan ceninge kema eda kanti tawanga teken Boas. Nongos cening ditu kanti ia suud madaar
Ruth3:4 Melahang pesan medasin tongosne masare. Yen ia suba pules
Ruth3:5 Rut tumuli masaur: “Tiang sairing ring pangandikan memene.”
Ruth3:6 Sasampun punika
Ruth3:7 Sasampune Boas wusan madaar
Ruth3:8 Rikala tengah wengi
Ruth3:9 Boas tumuli mataken: “Nyenke ene?” Pasaurnyane: “Titiang Rut panyeroan pamekele. Suecanin lan sayubinja titiang santukan pamekele patut anggen titiang sinalih tunggil saking kadang warga sane patut nglinguang titiang. Duaning punika ledang pamekele manjakang titiang. Sane mangkin rarisang ambil titiang.”
Ruth3:10 Pasaur Boase: “Dumadak luh kamertanin baan Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa. Ane jani luh suba nyinahang tresnan luhe teken kulawargan tiange
Ruth3:11 Sawireh keto
Ruth3:12 Mula tuah tiang nyaman matuan luhe ane saling kodag ane patut ngrunguang. Nanging diastu keto
Ruth3:13 Nah ane jani dini malu luh nginap. Buin mani semengan tiang lakar ngitungang ajak anake ento apake ia lakar nyak ngrunguang luh. Yen ia nyak melahan buka keto. Nanging yen ia tusing nyak
Ruth3:14 Duaning punika Rut raris pules nampek ring tebenan Boase. Nanging sadurung galang kangin ipun sampun bangun
Ruth3:15 Boas mabaos ring Rut sapuniki: “Mai kebatang slendang luhe dini.” Rut ngebatang slendangipune
Ruth3:16 Sasampune Rut rauh ring genah matuannyane
Ruth3:17 Atur ipune: “Gandume puniki paicayanga ring tiang sarwi ngandika sapuniki: ‘Edaja luh matalang mulih lakar matemu teken matuan luhe.’ “Rut tumuli nglanturang baosipune sapuniki: “Boas sane ngwehin tiang gandum puniki
Ruth3:18 Matuannyane tumuli mabaos: “Nah sabar malu luh
Ruth4:1 Boas raris mamargi ka genah anake paum
Ruth4:2 Sasampune punika Boas raris ngaturin panglingsir desane sareng dasa diri
Ruth4:3 Boas tumuli mabaos ring nyamannyane punika sapuniki: “Ane jani Naomi suba mulih uli Moab. Ia makeneh ngadep tanah Elimelek nyaman iragane.
Ruth4:4 Sinah beli suba nawang unduke ento. Yening beli makeneh meli orahang jani di arep parapanglingsire ane pada malinggih dini. Nanging yening beli tusing nyak
Ruth4:5 Boas raris mabaos: “Yening beli meli tanahe ento
Ruth4:6 Anake punika raris masaur: “Yening keto beli tusing nyak meli tanahe ento
Ruth4:7 Duk masane punika yen wenten anak ngadol wiadin nukarang pagelahannyane
Ruth4:8 Duaning punika duk anake punika mabaos ring Boas kadi asapuniki: “Adi dogen ane suba meli tanahe ento
Ruth4:9 Boas raris matur ring parapanglingsire miwah ring sakancan anake sane wenten irika: “Ida dane sareng sami dados saksi ring rahinane puniki
Ruth4:10 Kadi asapunika taler Rut
Ruth4:11 Parapanglingsire miwah anake sane wenten irika raris masaur: “Inggih tiang sampun dados saksi. Dumadak Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa nadosang rabin semetone punika sakadi Lea miwah Rahel sane sampun numbuhang bangsa Israel. Dumadak semeton sugih ring Eprata
Ruth4:12 Dumadak Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa jaga mapaica pianak ring semeton malantaran anake luh punika
Ruth4:13 Boas raris ngambil Rut kanggen kurenan. Antuk pasuecan Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
Ruth4:14 Duaning asapunika paraluh-luhe raris pada mabaos ring Naomi kadi asapuniki: “Puji Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa sane ngrauhang pitulungan ring embok
Ruth4:15 Mantun emboke tresna pisan tekening embok tur ngayahin embok langkungan tekening ayah-ayahan pianak muani pepitu. Sane mangkin ipun nglekadang cucu muani pabuat embok. Anake alit puniki pacang dados pangantungan keneh emboke tur pacang miara embok di masan emboke suba tua.”
Ruth4:16 Naomi tumuli ngambil anake alit punika tur matiningin ipun antuk kapitresnan sakadi nresnain pianaknyane niri.
Ruth4:17 Pisaga-pisaganipune sane luh-luh ngwastanin anake alit punika Obed. Duaning asapuniki baosnyane: “Naomi sampun maderbe pianak muani adiri.” Obed punika dados wong tuan Isai
Ruth4:18 Puniki babad katurunan Daude ngawit saking Peres inggih punika: Peres

1Samuel1:1 Wenten satunggaling anak lanang saking Rama
1Samuel1:2 Dane Elkana maderbe rabi kekalih. Sane duuran mapesengan Hana lan sane alitan mapesengan Penina. Dane Penina dados maderbe oka
1Samuel1:3 Nyabran warsa dane lunga saking Rama ka Silo
1Samuel1:4 Nyabran Dane Elkana maturan
1Samuel1:5 Yadiastu Dane Elkana kalintang tresna ring Dane Hana
1Samuel1:6 Nanging madun danene setata ngulati sungkan pakayunan danene
1Samuel1:7 Indike kadi asapunika sampun mamargi makudang-kudang taun suenipun. Nyabran Dane Hana rauh ring Perhyangan Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
1Samuel1:8 Suamin danene
1Samuel1:9 Sedek rahina anu
1Samuel1:10 Dane Hana sungsut pisan ring kayun tur masesambatan ngastawa ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
1Samuel1:11 Sapangrarisipun dane raris masesangi kadi asapuniki: “Oduh Ratu Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
1Samuel1:12 Daweg Dane Hana ngastawa mawanti-wanti ring ayun Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
1Samuel1:13 Duaning Dane Hana wantah mabaos ring kayun samaliha wantah lamben danene kewanten sane makemikan
1Samuel1:14 Dane Eli tumuli mataken sapuniki: “Buin makapidan luh lakar enu mamunyah? Suudja suba mamunyah amonto!”
1Samuel1:15 Nanging Dane Hana raris matur sapuniki: “Titiang nentenja punyah
1Samuel1:16 Sampunang pisan mitaenang titiang puniki jadma sane tan paji. Mawinan titiang ngastawa kadi asapunika suenipun
1Samuel1:17 Dane Eli raris ngandika sapuniki: “Kemaja luh mulih saha rahayu
1Samuel1:18 Sasampune punika anake istri punika raris matur sapuniki: “Mugi titiang polih kawelas arsan sang pandita.” Wusan punika Dane Hana raris medal. Dane raris kayun majengan tur swabawan danene nenten kantun ucem.
1Samuel1:19 Benjangne palimunan pisan
1Samuel1:20 Sasampune wenten awarsa
1Samuel1:21 Rikala rauh masan anake maturan
1Samuel1:22 Nanging Dane Hana nenten sareng lunga
1Samuel1:23 Dane Elkana
1Samuel1:24 Sasampune anake istri punika melas okan danene
1Samuel1:25 Sasampune puput nampah lembu
1Samuel1:26 Dane Hana tumuli matur sapuniki: “Inggih sang pandita. Menawi sang pandita kantun eling ring titiang. Titiang puniki sane riin ngastawa ring Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
1Samuel1:27 Titiang ngastawa buat nunas anake alit puniki
1Samuel1:28 Duaning asapunika sane mangkin titiang ngaturang ipun ring Ida
1Samuel2:1 Dane Hana tumuli ngastawa sapuniki: “Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa sampun ngebekin manah titiange antuk suka rena. Ambate bagian titiange malantaran pakardin Idane. Titiang prasida ngedekin musuh titiange. Ambate suka rena manah titiange
1Samuel2:2 Nenten wenten sane suci sakadi Ida
1Samuel2:3 Wusan ragane mabaos sumbung
1Samuel2:4 Panah prajurite sane teguh-teguh sampun lung
1Samuel2:5 Anake sane riin wareg
1Samuel2:6 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa ngamademang wiadin nguripang. Ida sane nedunang anake ka lokan anake padem
1Samuel2:7 Ida ngawinang anake dados tiwas wiadin sugih. Ida sane ngasorang miwah Ida taler sane nginggilang.
1Samuel2:8 Ida sane ningtingang anake sane nista saking buke
1Samuel2:9 Ida nyayubin urip kaulan Idane sane satia tuu
1Samuel2:10 Meseh-meseh Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa pacang kasirnayang. Ida jaga nyander ipun antuk kilap saking langite. Ida pacang nepasin jagate makasami. Ida pacang mapaica kawisesan ring sang prabu druen Idane
1Samuel2:11 Dane Elkana tumuli mantuk ka Rama nanging Dane Samuel okan danene kantun ring Silo ngiring Sang Pandita Eli dados pangancang Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa.
1Samuel2:12 Mungguing oka-okan Dane Eli sane lanang-lanang punika anak sane dursila
1Samuel2:13 Samaliha nenten ngamanggehang darmaning pandita. Nyabran wenten anak ngaturang aturan
1Samuel2:14 saha macek daginge sane sedek karatengang ring jambangane. Napija sane kenianga antuk garpune punika
1Samuel2:15 Malah-malah ring sapunapine sadereng muluk daginge punika kambil tur kaborbor
1Samuel2:16 Yening anake sane maturan punika masaur sapuniki: “Ngiringja margiang paindikan sane patut tur borbor dumun muluke puniki. Wusan punika rarisang ambil sane encen mantuk ring kayun.” Parekan panditane jaga masaur sapuniki: “Sampunangja sapunika. Aturangja daginge punika sane mangkin. Yening nenten kadi asapunika
1Samuel2:17 Dosan oka-okan Dane Eli punika kalintang abot ring ayun Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
1Samuel2:18 Mungguing Dane Samuel ngraris ngaturang ayah ring ayun Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
1Samuel2:19 Nyabran taun ibun danene ngardi jubah alit pabuat dane
1Samuel2:20 Dane Eli tumuli ngamertanin Dane Elkana miwah rabin danene
1Samuel2:21 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa ngamertanin Dane Hana
1Samuel2:22 Dane Eli sane mangkin sampun lingsir pisan. Dane tan mari mireng indik laksanan oka-okan danene marep ring wong Israele. Samaliha dane sareng kalih sampun merem ngajak paraistrine sane ngayah ring gapuran Kemah Linggih Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa.
1Samuel2:23 Duaning punika Dane Eli tumuli ngandika ring oka-okan danene sapuniki: “To ngudiang dadi cening malaksana ane buka keto
1Samuel2:24 Suudja cening malaksana buka keto. Ene paundukan ane abot pesan
1Samuel2:25 Yening ada anak pelih tekening timpalnyane
1Samuel2:26 Dane Samuel
1Samuel2:27 Wenten nabi adiri ngrauhin Dane Eli tur mabaos ring dane sapuniki: “Sapuniki sabdan Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa: Ulun suba ngedengang ragan Ulune teken leluur kitane Harun muah kulawargannyane dugase ia enu dadi panjak Piraune di Mesir.
1Samuel2:28 Buina Ulun suba milih ia uli pantaran suku bangsa Israele makejang buat dadi panditan ulune
1Samuel2:29 To ngudiang kita ngedotang aturan-aturan ane arsayang Ulun uli kaulan Ulune. Buina ngudiang dadi kita ngajiang pianak kitane lebihan teken Ulun malantaran kita ngulurin ia ngempek dewekne aji bagian aturan ane paling melaha ane aturanga baan kaulan Ulune teken Ulun.
1Samuel2:30 Ane malu
1Samuel2:31 Sasajaane lakar teka masanne
1Samuel2:32 Kita lakar nemu kakewehan tur iri ati nepukin sakancan mertane ane lakar paicayang Ulun teken wong Israele ane lenan
1Samuel2:33 Sakewala ada aukud katurunan kitane ane lakar lugrain Ulun idup
1Samuel2:34 Yening pianak kitane makadadua
1Samuel2:35 Ulun lakar nyelik satunggaling pandita ane subakti teken Ulun tur sedia nglaksanayang sapakarsan Ulune. Ulun lakar mapaica katurunan teken ia
1Samuel2:36 Asing-asing katurunan kitane ane nyidaang nutugang tuuh lakar tangkil teken panditane ento buat nunas pipis wiadin dedaaran. Ia lakar pada mapinunas apanga kalugra nulungin parapanditane apanga ia nyidaang maan dedaaran.”
1Samuel3:1 Dane Samuel sane kantun anom punika dados pangayah Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa katuntun antuk Dane Eli. Kala punika sabda miwah wahyu saking Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa arang pisan.
1Samuel3:2 Sedek rahina anu Dane Eli sane panyingakane sampun slamur
1Samuel3:3 Duk punika Dane Samuel sampun sirep ring Perhyangan Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa
1Samuel3:4 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa raris ngesengin Dane Samuel. Dane Samuel tumuli matur: “Inggih titiang aji.”
1Samuel3:5 Raris dane gagelisan ka genah Dane Eli sarwi matur: “Inggih aji punapike aji sane ngesengin titiang?” Dane Eli tumuli masaur: “Tusing cening
1Samuel3:6 Nanging Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa malih ngesengin dane. Dane Samuel matangi tur tangkil malih ring Dane Eli sarwi matur: “Inggih aji punapike aji sane ngesengin titiang?” Nanging Dane Eli malih masaur: “Bapa tusing ada ngaukin cening. Kemaja cening buin pules.”
1Samuel3:7 Dane Samuel durung uning mungguing Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa sane ngesengin dane
1Samuel3:8 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa ngesengin Dane Samuel sane kaping tiganipun. Dane tumuli matangi tur tangkil malih ring Dane Eli sarwi matur: “Inggih aji punapike aji sane ngesengin titiang?” Irika Dane Eli wau uning
1Samuel3:9 Duaning punika dane raris mabaos ring Dane Samuel sapuniki: “Nah kema cening pules
1Samuel3:10 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa raris rauh tur ngadeg irika sarwi ngesengin dane sakadi iwau: “Samuel! Samuel!” Dane Samuel tumuli matur: “Inggih Ratu
1Samuel3:11 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa raris masabda ring Dane Samuel sapuniki: “Tusing buin amunapa makelonne
1Samuel3:12 Kala ditu Ulun lakar nglaksanayang ancaman Ulune marep teken kulawargan Eline
1Samuel3:13 Sawireh Ulun suba masabda teken ia
1Samuel3:14 Ento krana Ulun nyekenang pesan ngwarahang teken kulawargan Eline
1Samuel3:15 Dane Samuel raris sirep rauh makasemengan. Rikala dane sampun matangi
1Samuel3:16 Nanging Dane Eli raris ngesengin Dane Samuel
1Samuel3:17 Dane Eli tumuli mataken asapuniki: “Apa ane kasabdayang baan Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa teken cening? Eda cening ngengkebang unduke ento teken bapa. Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa lakar sanget pesan nyisipang cening yening cening tuara nekedang sabdane ento teken bapa.”
1Samuel3:18 Irika Dane Samuel raris nguningayang ring Dane Eli sakancan sane kasabdayang antuk Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa. Abuku ko
1Samuel3:19 Dane Samuel sayan duur. Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa ngiangin dane tur sakancan baos danene prasida kasidan.
1Samuel3:20 Makasami bangsa Israele
1Samuel3:21 Ida Sang Hyang Widi Wasa tan papegatan mapakantenang raga ring Silo. Irika Ida sampun nyinahang raga tur masabda ring Dane Samuel. Tur yen Dane Samuel ngandika
1Samuel4:1 Kala punika bangsa Pilistine sampun mapupul nyadia jaga mayuda nglawan bangsa Israel. Duaning asapunika bangsa Israele raris pada medal jaga ngarepin bangsa Pilistin punika. Bangsa Israel ngwangun kemahnyane ring Eben-Haeser tur bangsa Pilistin ring Apek.
1Samuel4:2 Prajurit Pilistine raris ngebug prajurit Israele. Sajeroning payudan sane kalangkung rames
